name: protein-design-skills
description: Agent-agnostic protein design pipeline — 76 skills + 24 hooks + 16 scripts for RFdiffusion, ProteinMPNN, AlphaFold3, Boltz-1, Chai-1, and 15+ other tools. Covers backbone generation, sequence design, structure validation, and quality filtering.

plugins.name: protein-design-skills
plugins.description: End-to-end protein design orchestration plugin. Provides skills for 76+ workflows (binder design, antibody design, enzyme design, peptide design, macrocyclic design), hooks for automation (context injection, GPU checks, error recovery, pipeline orchestration), and standalone scripts for direct tool execution.
